title: hieracium murorum subsp. chloroleucum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. chloroleucum, also known as a lesser hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Hieracium murorum subsp. chloroleucum are said to help reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, thereby offering health benefits such as improved immune function and enhanced overall well-being. Hieracium murorum subsp. chloroleucum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for therapeutic purposes.
